name: Heavenly Good Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put yeast in a bowl.
2. Add bread flour to the bowl and stir.
3. Warm water in the microwave.
4. Mix honey with water, then add egg and beat until combined.
5. In another bowl, combine sugar, salt, buttermilk powder, and butter.
6. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients.
7. Start the machine.
